description: Digital-first health insurance provider offering supplementary health coverage to businesses and individuals. Combines insurance with preventive health tools and mental health support.
business_model: B2B2C - Sells health insurance to employers who offer it as employee benefit
target_market: French businesses (SMEs and enterprises), expanding to Belgium, Spain, and Canada
key_investors: Index Ventures, Ribbit Capital, Temasek, Coatue
competitive_advantage: User-friendly digital experience, preventive health focus, integrated mental health support

varden_fit.rationale: Potential insurance partner for Varden's occupational health services in France
